meta.title: RX SUBZERO | A deliberate cold-water ritual
meta.description: Meet RX SUBZERO, a collapsible facial basin with a clear dual breathing tube for a deliberate cold-water ritual at home.

hero.sub: A considered facial bath for cold water, ice and steady breathing. Designed to make the ritual feel clear, contained and repeatable.

context.title: Make room for a deliberate pause.
context.copy: RX SUBZERO brings the water, ice and breathing setup into one dedicated object. Nothing theatrical, just a simple ritual that can fit into the start of your day.
context.img_alt: RX SUBZERO face ice bath prepared with cold water and ice

points.title: Prepare simply
points.text: Open the basin and add cold water and ice to your preference.

points.title: Set your pace
points.text: Begin with cool water and shorter intervals as you learn what feels right.

points.title: Keep breathing
points.text: The integrated tube supports a steady breath while your face is in the water.

points.title: Store with ease
points.text: Rinse, air-dry and collapse the basin when the ritual is complete.

ritual.title: A cold ritual with space to breathe.
ritual.copy: The experience is intentionally simple: prepare the water, settle your breathing and approach the cold gradually.

steps.title: Prepare
steps.text: Open the basin, place it on a stable surface, and begin with cool water at a comfortable temperature.
steps.img_alt: RX SUBZERO basin prepared with cool water for the ritual

steps.title: Breathe and approach gradually
steps.text: Position the mouthpiece, keep your breathing steady, and approach the water in brief, comfortable intervals.
steps.img_alt: Person using the RX SUBZERO breathing tube during a facial cold-water ritual

steps.title: Rinse and store
steps.text: Empty, rinse with mild soap and water, let every part air-dry fully, then collapse the basin for storage.
steps.img_alt: RX SUBZERO basin and breathing tube air-drying after use

pain.title: Your mind is already running when you are only just beginning.
pain.copy: Screens, tasks, and noise can fill the morning before you find a moment to breathe.

aspiration.kicker: A more mindful way to begin
aspiration.title: Pause. Breathe. Find a clear sense of presence.
aspiration.copy: RX SUBZERO brings cold water and steady breathing together in a physical ritual that invites you to slow down for a moment.
aspiration.image_alt: RX SUBZERO ready for a mindful cold-water ritual

story.title: Not a generic container. A dedicated facial cold-water system.
story.copy: RX SUBZERO was created to turn a familiar practice into a simple, elegant experience designed around everyday wellbeing.

benefits.title: A brief encounter with cold. A more intentional beginning.
benefits.copy: It does not promise to solve your day. It offers a concrete moment to breathe and be present before you step into it.

items.title: A physical pause
items.text: Preparing the water and approaching the cold interrupts autopilot for a moment.

items.title: Space to breathe
items.text: The clear tube gives steady breathing a central place in the experience.

items.title: A sense of clarity
items.text: Cold water creates a direct sensory experience that is difficult to confuse with the usual routine.

items.title: A repeatable ritual
items.text: Preparation, use, and care follow a simple sequence for home.

product.title: Designed around the way you actually use it.
product.copy: The steel-blue basin opens for use and folds down for storage. Its clear dual breathing tube and integrated blue base keep the setup contained in one purpose-built format.
product.img_alt: RX SUBZERO collapsible face ice bath with its clear breathing tube

faq.title: Questions before you begin.
faq.copy: A straightforward look at setup, use and care.

items.q: What does the product consist of?
items.a: The product format shown includes the collapsible basin and its clear dual breathing tube with white mouthpiece.
Start with cool water, a comfortable temperature and brief intervals. Add ice gradually only if it feels appropriate for you.

items.q: How do I care for it?
items.a: Empty after use, rinse the basin and breathing tube with mild soap and water, then let both air-dry fully before storing.

items.q: Is cold exposure suitable for everyone?
items.a: Cold exposure may not be appropriate for everyone. If you have a health condition, sensitivity or concern, speak with a qualified healthcare professional first.

items.q: Where does it fit in a wellness or facial-care routine?
items.a: Use it as a brief cold-water step at a comfortable point in your routine. On the face, use it on clean skin, pat dry gently, and continue with the products you already use.

offer.title: Begin the day with a pause you can feel.
offer.copy: A collapsible system with a clear dual breathing tube, created to bring cold water and breathing into one clear, ordered experience.
offer.image_alt: Blue and white collapsible RX SUBZERO facial basin with clear breathing tube
offer.note: Use cold gradually and always at your own comfort level.

final.title: Before the noise, give yourself a moment to breathe and be present.
final.copy: Begin with cool water, progress gradually, and build a ritual that makes sense for you.
